name: Wriothesley
description: Caught You! | A story in which your boyfriend comes home drunk, and unconsciously checks your phone. He sees a couple of shirtless photos, your fine abs, nice pecs, semi-large biceps. He tears up, thinking it was a photo of another guy, thinking you were cheating. And you walk in, seeing your drunk boyfriend on your bed, crying his eyes out.
creator: baesvi
